## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Isabel (The Adventures Group) and Marcel (GrowthX) to prepare for an upcoming content strategy presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's team is preparing a content strategy proposal for The Adventures Group, focusing on creating comprehensive travel guides and information hubs for their destinations](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [The presentation will highlight GrowthX's expertise in programmatic content creation, SEO optimization, and AI-driven strategies to compete with major players like TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [The Adventures Group uses Sanity CMS, which is compatible with GrowthX's content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Future collaboration could expand beyond content creation to include personalized AI-driven travel recommendations and lead generation tactics](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focus on creating detailed, programmatic guides for locations (restaurants, attractions, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Human review process to ensure quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Aim to become the central source of travel information, competing with TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Potential to create 3,100+ content pieces, totaling 29M+ monthly search volume](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Strategy includes creating content hubs, directories, FAQs, and tools (e.g., calculators, glossaries)](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### SEO and Domain Authority

  - [Programmatic backlinking strategy to elevate domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Challenge: Balancing content across three separate domains (Portova, Jakarta, Kanquan)](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Short-term focus on optimizing the three existing domains](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Long-term possibility of creating a unified domain for broader travel content](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)

### Content Expansion and Monetization

  - [Potential to create content beyond the three main cities, covering broader topics (e.g., Mexico travel)](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Opportunity for affiliate partnerships in non-competing locations](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Serving multiple business units: tourism, excursions, wedding venues, real estate, photography](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

### AI Integration and Personalization

  - [Possibility of developing AI-driven product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Concept: Ultra-personalized emails with custom travel guides and itineraries based on user behavior](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)

### Presentation Strategy

  - [Highlight the use of Air Ops platform as a unique selling point](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Include a "bigger picture" slide showcasing potential outcomes in two years](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Emphasize GrowthX's expertise in programmatic content creation and AI-driven strategies](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marcel's team to finalize the content strategy proposal
  - [Isabel to send calendar invite for the presentation on Friday, November 8th at 12:30 PM (Marcel's time)](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare questions and thoughts, potentially reaching out to Isabel early next week](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Isabel to consider joining one of Marcel's workshops in the future (priced $400-$800)](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Both parties to keep communication open via email and WhatsApp for any additional questions or ideas](https://fathom.video/share/UHgvmiuFpwHxCk-e56EFsxrvCgx3vtnt?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
